expectations.text: execution-status.md artifact is created and tracks all 3 subtasks
expectations.evidence: No execution-status.md file exists anywhere in the without_skill directory. The only output artifact is outputs/implementation-summary.md, which summarizes work done but is not a structured status-tracking document.

expectations.text: ST-1: migrations/002_sso.up.sql created with tenant_sso_config table and users.keycloak_id column
expectations.evidence: codebase/migrations/002_sso.up.sql exists and contains: CREATE TABLE tenant_sso_config with all required columns (id, tenant_id, idp_entity_id, idp_sso_url, idp_certificate, sp_entity_id, enabled, created_at, updated_at), a foreign key on tenant_id referencing tenants(id), an index on tenant_id, and ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN keycloak_id TEXT UNIQUE.

expectations.text: ST-1: migrations/002_sso.down.sql created with reverse operations
expectations.evidence: codebase/migrations/002_sso.down.sql exists and contains: ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS keycloak_id, DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_tenant_sso_config_tenant_id, DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tenant_sso_config. All three up-migration operations are reversed.

expectations.text: ST-2: config/config.go modified to include SSOConfig struct with Keycloak fields
expectations.evidence: codebase/config/config.go contains SSOConfig struct with fields: KeycloakURL, KeycloakRealm, KeycloakAdminUser, KeycloakAdminPassword, SAMLCallbackURL, SPEntityID. The main Config struct includes SSO SSOConfig field. Load() populates all SSO fields from environment variables using the getEnv() pattern.

expectations.text: ST-3: internal/tenant/model.go modified to include TenantSSOConfig struct
expectations.evidence: codebase/internal/tenant/model.go contains TenantSSOConfig struct with all required fields (ID, TenantID, IdPEntityID, IdPSSOURL, IdPCertificate, SPEntityID, Enabled, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt) and appropriate JSON tags. The existing Tenant struct is preserved unchanged.

expectations.text: ST-3: internal/user/model.go modified to include KeycloakID *string field
expectations.evidence: codebase/internal/user/model.go contains User struct with KeycloakID *string field and json tag `json:"keycloak_id,omitempty"`. All existing fields (ID, Email, Password, TenantID, Role, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt) are preserved unchanged.

expectations.text: Task review was performed for each subtask (task-reviewer agent was spawned)
expectations.evidence: No evidence of task-reviewer agent being spawned. No review-related files exist in outputs/ or anywhere in the without_skill directory. A grep for 'review' or 'reviewer' across all files returned no matches. This is expected for a baseline run without the execution-flow skill.

expectations.text: Code review was performed for each subtask (code-reviewer agent was spawned)
expectations.evidence: No evidence of code-reviewer agent being spawned. No review-related files exist in outputs/ or anywhere in the without_skill directory. A grep for 'review' or 'reviewer' across all files returned no matches. This is expected for a baseline run without the execution-flow skill.
